raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirms latent potential as a prompt for value-aligned self-activation and growth-oriented behavior",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "human beings contain unrealized higher capacities analogous to biological development",
    "these capacities can be awakened through intentional vision or aligned action",
    "natural metaphors reliably map onto psychological or spiritual processes"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as extended metaphor but relies on unexamined analogy between physical and non-physical domains",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient treats the statement as a cue for deliberate practice toward realizing personal potential rather than passive expectation",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is read as guaranteeing automatic emergence of positive traits without corresponding behavioral effort or evidence"
}
